rationale: Review 1's findings (delete the rfl includeRight_apply; expose the three general BialgHom / Bialgebra.TensorProduct helpers instead of private; drop the four direct specializations of Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map_* / _root_.TensorProduct.antipode_def) are all verifiable from the diff, would shrink the file by ~20 lines of duplication while preserving behavior, and directly serve the reuse rubric; Review 2's empty findings therefore leave an inferior PR.
